title: senna polyantha
intro: Senna polyantha, also known as the senna or cassia plant, is a tropical shrub belonging to the legume family that is native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly as a laxative, due to its high content of anthraquinone glycosides, which stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. The health benefits of Senna polyantha include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as irritable bowel syndrome, and its antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and prevent infection. Senna polyantha can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, including tea, capsules, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote bowel regularity and alleviate digestive discomfort.
